actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A man has died in a fire in Norfolk.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Costa has decided to stay in Brazil and is not part of the Blues this year.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A pilot has died after his aircraft crashed in Hampshire.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A 19-year-old defensive signing has become the third player signing by interim manager Rob Page in a fortnight.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Abdul Abbasi, from Hull, appeared via videolink and did not enter a plea during the hearing at Hull Crown Court.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A fire in Aberdeenshire town's High Street in May 1998 claimed the life of 43-year-old Gordon Graham.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Tom Perchard, Demri Mitchell, Michael Charlton and Ollie Turner have all retired from triathlons to focus on cycling but have returned to win the Jersey Triathlon this summer.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Tom Perchard, Demri Mitchell, Michael Charlton and Ollie Turner

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Jo Gorrod, Philippa Worth, Katie Silva, Della Roderick and Mel Messervy

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A 16-year-old boy died after a car crash in Forres.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Lewandowski gave Bayern an early lead as he chipped Franck Ribery's pass into the net after three minutes.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Monchengladbach also secured their place in the semi-finals with a 2-1 victory over Hamburg

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The 27-year-old, capped 34 times by Wales, made 28 appearances last season for the Tykes as they won promotion to the Championship via the play-offs.
